svg.title: SemanticChunker pipeline
svg.desc: Five-stage pipeline: split into sentences, embed each sentence, compute cosine distance between adjacent pairs, find breakpoints where distance exceeds threshold, then merge sentences into final chunks.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does SemanticChunker split text into sentences?')
sendPrompt('What embedding model does SemanticChunker use?')
sendPrompt('How is cosine distance calculated between sentence embeddings?')
sendPrompt('What breakpoint threshold types does SemanticChunker support?')
sendPrompt('How does SemanticChunker merge sentences into final chunks?')
